schoolName: Russian Medical Academy of Continuous Professional Education (RMANPO)
reviewNotes: HELD - ok=false. RMANPO is a postgraduate-only medical academy (residency/ordinatura + PhD/aspirantura + continuing education for already-qualified doctors), founded 1930, Ministry of Health of Russia. No undergraduate MBBS/specialitet program exists, so no program maps honestly to the required courseSlug set (mbbs, medical-pg, bsc-nursing, pharmacy, bds) for this site's Indian pre-degree student audience. No English-medium program track was corroborated (the /en/ site paths returned a Russian-language 404). See accompanying .md for full source list and reasoning. Do not publish without a taxonomy change or new corroborating research.

draftContent.summary: HELD: RMANPO (est. 1930, Moscow) is a Russian Ministry of Health postgraduate medical academy offering residency (ordinatura), postgraduate/PhD study (aspirantura), and continuing education for already-qualified doctors. It has no undergraduate MBBS-equivalent program, so it cannot be published under this site's current MBBS/BDS/Pharmacy/Nursing course taxonomy without misrepresenting the institution to prospective Indian pre-degree students.
draftContent.campusLifestyle: HELD - not built out. RMANPO's student population is postgraduate/practicing-physician, not undergraduate international students, so a standard MBBS-style campus-life narrative would misrepresent the institution.
draftContent.cityProfile: HELD - not built out for this institution page. Moscow city context would need to be authored specifically for a program type this site actually lists.
draftContent.clinicalExposure: HELD - not built out. RMANPO's clinical training is residency-level (for licensed physicians), not equivalent to MBBS clinical postings for pre-degree students.
draftContent.hostelOverview: HELD - RMANPO lists hostels at Moscow ul. Smolnaya 40 and Leningradskoye Shosse 106 per its own site navigation, but full hostel content was not developed since the program-fit gate failed.

faq.question: Does RMANPO offer an MBBS program for international students?
faq.answer: No. RMANPO is a postgraduate medical academy under Russia's Ministry of Health, offering only residency (ordinatura), postgraduate/PhD study (aspirantura), and continuing education for physicians who already hold a medical degree.

faq.question: Why is this university not published on the site?
faq.answer: Its programs do not map to this site's current course categories (MBBS, BDS, Pharmacy, Nursing, or an equivalent pre-degree pathway), so no honest program listing could be created.

faq.question: Could RMANPO be added in the future?
faq.answer: Yes, if the site adds a category for postgraduate medical residency/fellowship programs aimed at already-qualified doctors, RMANPO would be a well-documented candidate for that category.
